case_title: GRAEME STANDING ET AL VS. RHONDA J. DALLIMONTI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-19-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. - PLAINTIFFS GRAEME STANDING AND LEIGHANN BREEZE ARE PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT RHONDA J. DALLIMONTE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT STATES THAT THE EXHIBITS SUBMITTED FOR REVIEW BY THE COURT ARE PICTURES AND TEXTS MESSAGES BETWEEN PARTIES PRIOR TO THE FILING OF THIS LAWSUIT. PLAINTIFFS STATES THAT THEY ARE IN RECEIPT OF THE PHOTOS, TEXTS AND EMAILS FROM DEFENDANT. AGREEMENT IS REACHED BETWEEN PARTIES IN OPEN COURT. PREVIOUS CHECK RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFFS FROM DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $5003.30 IS TORN UP IN OPEN COURT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PROVIDE A NEW CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,599.00, FOR THE RETURNED SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE MAILED TO PLAINTIFFS. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE IF THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE MET AND THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO AUGUST 19, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED.
REMARK: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANDING, GRAEME BREEZE, LEIGHANN
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $996.70 FILED BY STANDING, GRAEME BREEZE, LEIGHANN AS TO DEFENDANT DALLIMONTI, RHONDA J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED MAY-05-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DALLIMONTI, RHONDA J.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANDING, GRAEME BREEZE, LEIGHANN
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLED.
REMARK: RETURN MAIL-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO RHONA DALLIMONTI-VACANT/UNABLE TO FORWARD
REMARK: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
